claims.claim: Mathematically, it appears in the **Schrödinger equation**: $$ i\hbar \frac{\partial \psi}{\partial t} = \hat{H} \psi $$ Here, $ \hat{H} $ is the Hamiltonian, $ \psi $ is the wavefunction, and $ i\hbar \frac{\partial \psi}{\partial t} $ describes how the state changes over time.
